instruction: Please move 15cm to your left side and then open your gripper.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, 0.15, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')```

instruction: Please move 0.1m to your right side and then close your claw.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('close')```

instruction: Please move 20cm to your left, then 15cm above you.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, 0.2, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.15])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)```

instruction: Please move 0.2m to your right, then 15cm above you.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.2, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.15])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)```

instruction: Please move 20 cm to the left, then 15cm in front of you, and finally 10cm to the right.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, 0.2, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.15, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
target_pos3 = target_pos2 + np.array([0, -0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos3, current_quat)```

instruction: Please move 20 cm to the right, then 15cm in front of you, and finally 10cm to the left, and then open your claw.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.2, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.15, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
target_pos3 = target_pos2 + np.array([0, 0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos3, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')```

instruction: Please open your clamp first, then move 10 cm to the left, then 15cm in front of you, and finally 15cm to the right.
code:
```python
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, 0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.15, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
target_pos3 = target_pos2 + np.array([0, -0.15, 0])
pri.move(target_pos3, current_quat)```

instruction: Please move 10cm to your right, then 10cm to your front, then 10cm to your left, and finally 10cm to your back.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.1, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
target_pos3 = target_pos2 + np.array([0, 0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos3, current_quat)
target_pos4 = target_pos3 + np.array([-0.1, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos4, current_quat)```

instruction: Please move 10cm to your right, then close your claw, then move 15cm to the front, then release your claw.
code:
```python
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.1, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('close')
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.15, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')```

instruction: Please open your gripper first, then move 20cm to the right, then 15cm to the front, then 8cm to the left, then 10cm to the back, and finally close your gripper.
code:
```python
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')
current_pos, current_quat = pri.get_current_pose()
target_pos = current_pos + np.array([0, -0.2, 0])
pri.move(target_pos, current_quat)
target_pos2 = target_pos + np.array([0.15, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos2, current_quat)
target_pos3 = target_pos2 + np.array([0, 0.08, 0])
pri.move(target_pos3, current_quat)
target_pos4 = target_pos3 + np.array([-0.1, 0, 0])
pri.move(target_pos4, current_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('close')```

instruction: Pick up the blue block and position it 10cm right to the red block.
code:
```python
pri.grab('blue_block')
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
target_pos = red_pos + np.array([0, -0.1, 0.1])
pri.move(target_pos, red_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')
pri.reset_robot()```

blue_pos, blue_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('blue_block')
target_pos = blue_pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.1])
pri.move(target_pos, blue_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')
pri.grab('green_block')
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
target_pos = red_pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.1])
pri.move(target_pos, red_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')
pri.grab('yellow_block')
green_pos, green_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('green_block')
target_pos = green_pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.1])
pri.move(target_pos, green_quat)
pri.gripper_ctrl('open')```
